prestazioni: LSJ 2.4L supercharged Ecotec engine (engine code: LE5) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (12 psi boost) paired with a custom billet crankshaft pulley from ZZP Performance to reduce parasitic loss and increase airflow efficiency by 15%.

Full 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system from Stainless Works with 409-grade mandrel-bent tubing, 5-inch resonated mufflers, and a custom X-pipe design to optimize scavenging for the LSJ’s unique exhaust manifold layout, reducing backpressure by 30%.

Custom ECU reflash via HP Tuners VCM Suite targeting 220+ whp (stock: 260 hp) with a revised ignition timing map (12° BTDC at peak torque), methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit (50/50 meth-water mix), and a ported throttle body from Injen for improved airflow at high RPM (7,500+ redline).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works HHR SS-specific kit (fiberglass fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 2-inch extended wheelbase to accommodate staggered 19x9.5 (front) and 19x11 (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 255/35/19 and 295/30/19 tires.

Full carbon fiber aero package from Seibon Carbon, including a GT-style rear wing (35mm adjustable angle), front splitter with integrated canards, and a custom hood with a 3-inch cowl scoop to feed the Magnuson supercharger. Painted in PPG Vibrance Collection ‘Hyper Blue’ with matte black accents.

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub. Gauges replaced with a Defi Advance BF series 5-inch digital dash (boost, AFR, oil pressure, and EGT readouts).
